rows.notes: Both extractors agree completely on this row. Confirmed by visual inspection as a clear page title with no associated monetary amounts.

Both extractors agree on row type and no amounts. For description, 'Rectori' from gpt-5-mini is clearer than 'Rectoru' from gemini-flash. 'Officiariis-' from gemini-flash is a more accurate transcription of the final word and trailing hyphen than gpt-5-mini's 'Officiaruis'.
This row is a bracketed header clearly visible in the image. gpt-5-mini correctly identified and extracted it, noting it as a 'structural group label'. gemini-flash missed this row entirely.

rows.description: Stipend: ad Fest: Nativ: et Officiar: -p.420

rows.english_description_with_amount: Stipend paid for Christmas festival to the officers, amounting to £19 0s 0d.

rows.english_description_with_amount: Augmentation paid for the common fund to the doctor and the chaplain, amounting to £60 0s 0d.

rows.notes: Both extractors agree on monetary amounts and row type. gemini-flash's description 'D. 1819 - - - - - p.424-' is a more accurate visual match for the abbreviation 'D.' (vs 'Dd.') and the specific number of trailing hyphens and page reference with a trailing hyphen.

rows.notes: This row is a bracketed header clearly visible in the image. gpt-5-mini correctly identified it, while gemini-flash missed this structural row. Corrected punctuation to colons after 'Fest' and 'Annun' based on visual inspection.

Visual verification confirms gemini-flash's reading of 8 pence and the page reference 'p.428-'. gpt-5-mini misread pence as 0 and the page reference as 'p.420'. gemini-flash also correctly captures the description's colons and hyphens.

rows.notes: Both extractors agree on monetary amounts and row type. gemini-flash's description 'L. Whittingham. Com Bent. pro Ann. præt. p.444' is a more accurate visual reading for the names, abbreviations ('Com Bent.' vs 'Combrant.'), and the accent in 'præt.'. gpt-5-mini had a good note about uncertainty but misread several parts of the description.

rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to the Rector as above, amounting to £30 9s 2d.

rows.notes: Both extractors agree on pounds and shillings. The pence column visually shows a dash. gemini-flash interprets this as an empty string for pence, which is a literal transcription of the visual and a common way to represent 'no pence' in ledger extractions when the schema allows an empty string. gpt-5-mini interpreted it as '0'.
